# Function reference {.doc .doc-index}

## Widget

The `%%steps` cell magic and the `StepsWidget` it renders.

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [StepsWidget](StepsWidget.qmd#steps_widget.widget.StepsWidget) | Displays the substitution/reduction trace of `# PRINT STEPS`-tagged statements. |
| [register_steps_magic](register_steps_magic.qmd#steps_widget.widget.register_steps_magic) | Register the `%%steps` cell magic. |

## Command line

The `print-steps` console script.

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [run_student_file](run_student_file.qmd#steps_widget.print_steps.run_student_file) | Trace every `# PRINT STEPS`-tagged line of a student script to stderr. |

::: {.callout-note}
This page is a placeholder. Run `pixi run api` (quartodoc) to regenerate it and
the per-symbol pages from the live docstrings.
:::
